rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.044 governs credit card political contribution reporting. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 254.044. REPORTING OF POLITICAL CONTRIBUTIONS AND EXPENDITURES MADE USING CREDIT CARD.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
